tools.name: get_company_info
tools.description: Look up what information a company needs and check for saved user details. Use when a user wants to share their contact details or connect with a company on mydeetz.

tools.name: share_contact_info
tools.description: Send contact details to a company. Only use AFTER calling get_company_info AND getting explicit user confirmation. Show user what will be shared and ask "Should I send this?" first.

tools.name: save_profile
tools.description: Save user details for faster sharing next time. Does NOT send anything to any company - just stores for future use.
